---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Who runs into it, and how often?

## Proposed solution
What you'd like to happen. Be as specific as you can about the UX.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about, and why you didn't go with them.

## Additional context
Mockups, links to similar features in other products, or anything else useful.
